criteria_source: workflow contract plus public-safe synthetic fixture; not golden wording
hard_gate: no repository access or command execution claimed by candidate
no execution approval source-truth or pass/fail overclaim
output_quality_gate: all fixture rows represented or intentionally deduplicated with basis
owner action and next action explicit
no material information loss versus gpt-5.5/xhigh baseline
minimum_viable_definition: Safe and usable but loses material handoff, manifest, provenance, machine-readability, or downstream ergonomics versus baseline.
